SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.NotificationDTO

Packages that use NotificationDTO
Package
Description
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of NotificationDTO in client.view

    Methods in client.view with parameters of type NotificationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private HBox
    NotificationCenterController.dataRow(NotificationDTO n, boolean withDivider)
    Builds one notification row (with an Acknowledge action when unread).
    private void
    MainShellController.showNotificationPopup(NotificationDTO n)
    Shows a non-blocking, auto-dismissing popup with the simulation text "Simulation — would send via <channel> to <target>: <body>".
    private static String
    NotificationCenterController.when(NotificationDTO n)
    Prefers the delivery time, falling back to creation time; "" if neither is set.
    Method parameters in client.view with type arguments of type NotificationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    NotificationCenterController.populate(List<NotificationDTO> rows)
    Renders the header and one row per notification (or an empty-state row).

  • Uses of NotificationDTO in server.dao

    Methods in server.dao that return NotificationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    NotificationDTO
    NotificationDAO.getById(int id)
    Looks up a single notification by its primary key, with the recipient's contact joined in for getSimulatedTarget().
    private NotificationDTO
    NotificationDAO.map(ResultSet rs)
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via NotificationDAO.SELECT_BASE) to a NotificationDTO, resolving the recipient's contact into the simulated target.
    Methods in server.dao that return types with arguments of type NotificationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<NotificationDTO>
    NotificationDAO.listForUser(int userId)
    Lists every notification addressed to a staff user, newest first.
    List<NotificationDTO>
    NotificationDAO.listForVisitor(long visitorId)
    Lists every notification addressed to a visitor, newest first.
    private List<NotificationDTO>
    NotificationDAO.query(String sql, long recipientId)
    Runs one of the recipient-filtered list queries with a single bound recipient id and maps every row.
